text.title: Code Decomposition Principles Procedure
text.summary: 5-step audit: scan → measure → classify → draft → review.

step.name: scan
step.action: Run decomp-candidates.sh to list files crossing thresholds.

step.name: classify-responsibilities
step.action: Tag each file with responsibility kinds; record %.

step.name: draft-records
step.action: Walk decision tree; emit decision record per file.
step.decision-gate: If signals contradict (e.g. high size but zero churn), default to leave with a 90-day re-check note.

step.name: review
step.action: Owner reviews; sets status accepted / deferred / rejected.
